name: Captain Crunch
desc: John Draper discovered that a toy whistle in Captain Crunch cereal boxes emitted 2600Hz — the frequency to redirect telephone calls. Find a blue box schematic on an old BBS and decrypt the MF tones.
obj: DECRYPT a BBS server and download the file "blueprint.bin"

name: The 414 Gang
desc: In 1983, the 414 group breached over 60 systems including Los Alamos Labs. Their strength was the chain. Prove your skill by connecting 3 servers in a bounce chain.
obj: Build a bounce chain of at least 3 hops

name: Mitnick's Ghost
desc: Kevin Mitnick used social engineering as his primary weapon. CONNECT to a corporate server using LOGIN with a password found elsewhere to impersonate an administrator.
obj: Use LOGIN to access a server with a known password

name: Morris Worm
desc: Robert Morris Jr. released the first worm on the Internet in 1988. Your worm has escaped control. Create a kill-sig by combining two virus files and upload it to an infected server.
obj: Use COMBINE to create a kill-sig, then UPLOAD to a server

name: Poulsen's Switch
desc: Kevin Poulsen hijacked KIIS-FM phone lines to win a Porsche. Tamper with a GSM server and redirect routing to win the prize.
obj: Crack a GSM server (GSM tower) and transfer the file "channel-3"

name: Levin's Vault
desc: Vladimir Levin convinced his accomplices to transfer 10 million from Citibank. Use a chain of 5 bounce servers to cover your tracks and transfer funds from a bank.
obj: 5-hop chain and TRANSFER of at least $10,000

name: Lamo's Confession
desc: Adrian Lamo breached the New York Times and added his name to the op-ed database. Find a news server, crack it, and upload a text file to publish the truth.
obj: Crack a news server, perform UPLOAD of a .txt file

name: McKinnon's Search
desc: Gary McKinnon searched for proof of UFO technology on NASA and Pentagon servers. Breach a military .mil server, steal the intelligence, and sell it on the black market.
obj: Steal intel from a .mil server and sell it with SELLINTEL

name: Gonzalez Ring
desc: Albert Gonzalez orchestrated the largest credit card theft — 170 million numbers. Extract data from 5 different commercial servers (DOWNLOAD files from 5 servers).

name: Anonymous Rising
desc: It's time to lead the uprising. Coordinate a massive DDoS attack. Build 3 parallel bounce chains and launch an exploit on a government server.
obj: 3 chains of 2 hops EACH + crack a government server
